headline: Morgan Stanley Raises its Price Target on Valero Energy (VLO) to $232
summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) is one of the 10 All-Time High But Still Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Valero Energy, Phillips 66 and HF Sinclair
